news.summary: In California, a company called Sila, specializing in next-generation battery materials, has named Helena Schwarz as the new Director of Government Affairs. Schwarz, previously from Novonix Limited, a U.S. synthetic graphite producer, will now be responsible for leading Sila's government advocacy programs. Her main task will involve promoting the company's policy objectives within state and federal legislative departments, as well as industry groups. She will concentrate on enhancing U.S. market competitiveness.
news.headline: Sila names Helena Schwarz as Director of Government Affairs to promote policy priorities, coming from Novonix Limited.Character count: 117

news.summary: The Bitcoin price failed to maintain its weekly opening gains on April 10th as US stocks showed no reaction to positive inflation data. Data from Cointelegraph Markets Pro and TradingView indicated increased volatility in BTC price around the release of the March Consumer Price Index, which was below expectations. The US Bureau of Labor Statistics reported a 2.4% rise in the all items index and a 2.8% increase in the all items excluding food and energy index for the 12 months ending in March. Despite this, US stocks like S&P 500 and Nasdaq were down by 3% and 3.7%, respectively, due to concerns about trade wars. BTC's price action was influenced by the US tariff pause, with market participants awaiting further developments. A trader indicated that BTC needed to surpass $83,000 to see positive movement. Another trader emphasized the significance of 21 and 50-day simple moving averages on the daily chart for analyzing BTC's price movement. The role of large-volume traders like "Spoofy the Whale" in influencing BTC's price action was also discussed, with the hope that breaking certain resistance levels could pave the way for Bitcoin to reach six-figure value. This article highlights the importance of conducting individual research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: BTC failed to hold weekly open gains as US stocks ignored positive inflation data. Prices increasingly volatile, with CPI rising 2.4% for the 12 months ending March. S&P 500 down 3%, Nasdaq down 3.7%. BTC rebound depends on "Spoofy the Whale." Bulls need to reclaim at least $83,000. Trading analysis shows key resistance levels. Large-volume traders influencing price action. Considerations for potential increase to $93.3k.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, the Children's Brain Tumor Network (CBTN) announced the addition of Hassenfeld Children's Hospital at NYU Langone as a member institution. This partnership brings together cutting-edge research and treatment capabilities to benefit children affected by brain tumors.

news.summary: Tetrate has released an enterprise-ready Istio ambient mode that is FIPS-compliant, aiming to assist enterprise customers in minimizing service mesh expenses and streamlining management procedures while upholding security standards. This integrated mode is designed to deliver enhanced operational efficiency and reduced costs for businesses utilizing Istio and Envoy technologies.
news.headline: Tetrate introduces Istio Ambient Mode in partnership with US Air Force, FIPS-compliant, reduces service mesh costs.

news.summary: Foreclosure proceedings have heightened in the first quarter of 2025, with an alarming 14% surge in foreclosure starts compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, bank repossessions have gone up by 8% during the same period. These findings were unveiled by ATTOM, a prominent provider of real estate and property information, based in Irvine, California. The data was part of their quarterly U.S. Foreclosure Market Report, signaling a concerning trend in the housing market.
news.headline: Foreclosure activity rises in US Q1 2025 - Starts increase by 14%, Bank Repossessions up 8% from previous quarter.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Purebase Corporation (OTCQB: PUBC) revealed that they have successfully shipped and sold Humate Advantage to Pakistan for use in agriculture. This move is part of their plan to reintroduce the product and expand sales into Asian and Central and South American markets, apart from the United States. Purebase Corporation is a renowned provider of sustainable mineral-based solutions for agriculture and construction. This development signifies a pivotal advancement in their business strategy to tap into diverse international markets and promote their innovative product, Humate Advantage.
news.headline: Purebase Corp sells Humate Advantage to Pakistan, expanding into international markets for agriculture.

news.summary: A French court has barred Marine Le Pen, the leader of right-wing National Rally (RN) and a leading candidate in the 2027 presidential elections, from running for office for five years. She was convicted of "embezzlement of public funds" and sentenced to four years in prison, with two years suspended and two to be served under house arrest. This move by the court is concerning as it signals the erosion of democratic norms in the European Union. France is the third NATO member this year to bar a candidate from elections, following Romania and Turkey. Le Pen's RN received 37% of the votes in the French national election in June, a significant increase compared to previous years. Polls suggest that Le Pen would easily win the first round of France's presidential elections, with about 36% of the vote. This prosecution of Le Pen is seen as reminiscent of legal attacks against former US President Donald Trump. The article raises concerns about the impact of empowering courts to cancel election outcomes, emphasizing the importance of democratic processes.
news.headline: French court bars Marine Le Pen from running in 2027 elections, sentences her to 4 years, with 37% of most recent votes.

news.summary: SES Space & Defense, a subsidiary of SES, based in Reston, Virginia, has appointed Maj Gen Roger W. Teague, USAF (Ret), to its Board of Directors. Teague brings over 30 years of experience in the U.S. Air Force, overseeing key satellite programs such as MILSTAR and SBIRS. With a background commanding at various levels and holding executive roles in HQ U.S. Air Force and Air Force Space Comm, his expertise will contribute significantly. This nomination underscores SES Space & Defense's commitment to leveraging top-tier talent in advancing its strategic initiatives.
news.headline: SES Space & Defense, a subsidiary of SES, appoints Maj Gen Roger W. Teague, USAF (Ret), to its BOD after 30 yrs in Air Force.

news.headline: New report maps financial crime risks in 177 countries, reveals Secretariat Economic Crime Index. Highlights 2025 trends.

news.summary: Morgan Stanley has revised its forecast for banks, highlighting a sense of caution expected from JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, and BlackRock in their upcoming earnings reports to be released on Friday. news.headline: Morgan Stanley lowers banks outlook, warns on JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, BlackRock earnings; reports due Friday.
